svg.title: KBAgent — data architecture
svg.desc: 3-tier storage: file system, embedded graph DB (Kuzu), append-only flat files. Entity và node definitions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Intent file schema: id, title, type, status, milestone, repos[], linked_goal_id, tasks[], created_at, updated_at')
sendPrompt('KBDoc: 16-tier path, frontmatter (id, title, tier, tags, source_of_truth), Markdown body')
sendPrompt('system-map.md: project identity, active goals, current focus, architecture overview, doctrine stage')
sendPrompt('debt-index.md + entropy-index.md: structured list, item id, severity, age, linked_intent, source')
sendPrompt('focus.md: current intent context, staged files list, notes. apply-record.json: applied_at, files, decision, evidence summary')
sendPrompt('ontology-contract.json: node type definitions, edge type definitions, repo_origin enum (user-defined), validation rules')
g.text: node types · edge types · user config

g.onclick: sendPrompt('apply-record.json: per-intent, applied_at, staged_files[], decision, evidence_summary')

svg.text: Tier 2 — Unified Knowledge Graph (Kuzu · embedded · Cypher · written only at Retro)

g.onclick: sendPrompt(':Goal properties: id, title, horizon, owner, status (active|warning|superseded), criteria [{name, target, unit, current}], created_at')
sendPrompt(':Intent properties: id, title, type (exec|fix|exception), status, milestone, repos[], linked_goal_id, task_count, created_at, closed_at')
sendPrompt(':Rule properties: id (KBX-xxx), title, status (draft|active|deprecated|retired), state (planned|implemented|verified), domain, created_at')
sendPrompt(':KBDoc properties: id, path (16-tier), title, tier (0-15), tags[], source_of_truth bool, verified_at')
sendPrompt(':Code properties: id, file_path, language, complexity (cyclomatic), fan_in, linked_intent_id')
sendPrompt(':Signal properties: id, type (chaos_snapshot|drift|anomaly), level, score, delta, timestamp, snapshot_path')
sendPrompt(':Release properties: id, version (semver), released_at, linked_intent_ids[], changelog_summary')
sendPrompt(':Lesson properties: id, title, domain, level (team|project|system), lifecycle (proposed|enforced), linked_intent_id')

svg.text: Evidence metadata — property trên mọi node và edge
source (copilot|human|system) · confidence · timestamp · linked_intent_id · version · repo_origin
Edge types (tất cả có evidence metadata)
Tier 3 — Append-only flat files (ndjson / JSON · portable · no query needed)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('chaos-history.ndjson: append-only, {timestamp, score, level, breakdown:{structural,coverage,intent,cognitive,testing}, delta, forward_estimates[]}')
sendPrompt('checkpoints.json: array of {id, timestamp, intent_id, branch, step, staged_files[], note, focus_md_snapshot}')
sendPrompt('release-catalog.json: array of {version, released_at, intent_ids[], changelog, graph_export_path}')

svg.text: ① Tier 2 (graph) ← written only by Retro engine at close intent. All other reads.
② Tier 1 intent files ← written by Intent engine (create/activate/close). Graph node synced at Retro.
③ Tier 3 chaos ← appended by Chaos engine at each run. Signal bus reads for spike detect.
④ ontology-contract.json defines valid node labels + edge types — Kuzu schema bootstrapped from it.
